app.name: RenewMyTIE

status.title: Application Status Tracker
status.normalMessage: Your application is being processed. This is normal.
status.thresholdMessage: Almost at the 20-day threshold! Check your status.
status.pastMessage: Past the 20-day threshold. If no requerimiento was issued, your renewal should be approved via silencio administrativo positivo.
